title: Slow Request Detection (>2s)
description: Detects requests exceeding 2-second latency across CRM and Drone Shop. Correlates with trace_id for APM drilldown and db.target for database performance investigation.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and 'performance.slow_request' = true | stats avg('http.response_time_ms') as AvgLatency, max('http.response_time_ms') as MaxLatency, count as SlowRequests by 'service.name', 'http.url.path' | sort -AvgLatency
falsepositives: Expected slow queries during batch operations
